request.query: query ShopifyPaymentsAccountAccessProbe { shopifyPaymentsAccount { id activated country defaultCurrency onboardable payouts(first: 1) { nodes { id } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } disputes(first: 1) { edges { node { id } } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } balanceTransactions(first: 1) { nodes { id } pageInfo { hasNextPage hasPreviousPage startCursor endCursor } } } }

errors.message: Access denied for shopifyPaymentsAccount field. Required access: the `read_shopify_payments` or the `read_shopify_payments_accounts` access scope.
